problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
hypothesis: If Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction is applied to colonize, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
